metadata.summary: Public utility functions for Ionworks code.

documentation:
# Ionworks utility functions

Public utility functions for Ionworks code

functions.name: iwutil.save.create_folder
documentation:
Create a folder if it does not exist

Parameters
----------
filename : str
    File name in the folder to create

functions.name: iwutil.save.json
documentation:
Save params to a json file

Parameters
----------
params : dict
    Dictionary of parameters
filename : str
    Full path and name of the file to save

functions.name: iwutil.save.csv
documentation:
Save df to a csv file

Parameters
----------
df : pandas.DataFrame
    DataFrame to save
filename : str
    Full path and name of the file to save

functions.name: iwutil.save.parquet
documentation:
Save df to a parquet file

Parameters
----------
df : pandas.DataFrame
    DataFrame to save
filename : str
    Full path and name of the file to save

functions.name: iwutil.save.fig
documentation:
Save fig to a file

Parameters
----------
fig_to_save : matplotlib.figure.Figure
    Figure to save
filename : str
    Full path and name of the file to save

functions.name: iwutil.subplots_autolayout
documentation: Create a subplot element with a

functions.name: iwutil.check_and_combine_options
documentation:
Check that all required options are provided, and combine default and custom options

Parameters
----------
default_options : dict
    Dictionary of default options. Each key is an option name, and the value can be
    either:
    - The default value for that option
    - "[required]" if the option must be provided in custom_options
    - A list of allowed values for that option. If the option is not provided in
      custom_options, the first value in the list is used.
custom_options : dict, optional
    Dictionary of custom options, by default None. If a key in custom_options is not
    in default_options, an error is raised.

Returns
-------
dict
    Combined options

Raises
------
ValueError
    If a key in custom_options is not in default_options
    If a required option is not provided in custom_options
    If a list option is not one of the allowed values

functions.name: iwutil.read_df
documentation:
Read a dataframe from a file. Currently supports csv, xls, xlsx, json, and parquet.

Parameters
----------
file : str or Path
    File to read
**kwargs : dict
    Additional keyword arguments to pass to the read function

functions.name: iwutil.read_json
documentation:
Read a json file and sanitize the input

Parameters
----------
file_name : str or Path
    File to read

functions.name: iwutil.copyfile
documentation:
Copy a file from src to dst, creating the parent directory if it does not exist

Parameters
----------
src : str or Path
    Source file
dst : str or Path
    Destination file

functions.name: iwutil.this_dir
documentation: Get the directory of the file

functions.name: iwutil.append_path
documentation:
Append a path to the current path

Parameters
----------
path : str or Path
    Path to append

classes.name: iwutil.OptionSpec
documentation:
Specification for an option

Parameters
----------
default_value : any
    The default value for the option
other_allowed_values : list, optional
    A list of allowed values for the option, by default None. If None, the value
    can be anything. If a list, the value must be in this list.
